extracted_content.title: Work with Us | Acorn
extracted_content.markdown:

[IMAGE: 101Smart Ltd.]
Home → https://acornvillages.com/
Jobs

H1: Work with Us

Make a Real Difference — Every Single Day
At Acorn Village, we believe life is for living - for the incredible people we support, and for the dedicated team who make it all possible.
When you join us, you become part of a warm, inclusive community where your compassion, creativity, and care truly matter. Every day brings opportunities to make a real difference - helping someone build confidence, learn a new skill, or simply share a smile. In doing so, you’ll discover that the lives you change include your own.
Join us — and be proud of the difference you make.

H4: Training and Development

We’re passionate about helping our team grow. Every new member of staff receives a thorough induction programme, followed by regular ongoing training designed to build confidence, knowledge, and professional skills.
Our training includes:
Mandatory care training (e.g. safeguarding, first aid, manual handling)
Specialist learning disability support
Person-centred care approaches
Health & safety and compliance updates
Opportunities for professional development and recognised qualifications
At Acorn Village, we believe learning never stops. We’ll support you every step of the way — so you can deliver the best care, and be the very best version of yourself.

H2: Benefits of Working at Acorn

[DROPDOWN: Working Well]
  We strive to embed a workplace culture of understanding, awareness, support and kindness .
  With a strategy dedicated to ‘Staff & Volunteer Wellbeing’, we pride ourselves on our tailored supportive structures and variety of available provisions designed to meet the wellbeing support needs of everyone within the Acorn team.
  This commitment has been formally recognised through our achievement of Level 3 Working Well Accreditation. We work hard to maintain this standard.
  The team have access to our Wellbeing Pod, a growing number of Mental Health First Aiders, spiritual support, a wide-ranging information resource, Mental Health training and a variety of holistic therapies including; free Counselling, Pilates, Reiki, Meditation, Reflexology, Massage and injury support.
  We regularly raise awareness of wellbeing themed nation-wide events to offer opportunities for; education, self-awareness, reflective practice, an opening of minds, a starting of conversations, promoting inclusion and enhancing employee psychological safety.
[DROPDOWN: What We Offer]
  As an employee at Acorn Village, you’ll be part of a supportive, friendly team that truly makes a difference every day. We value our staff and are committed to helping everyone feel confident, appreciated, and supported in their role.
  We offer:
  An induction and ongoing training programme to help you succeed and grow in your role
  Long Service Awards to recognise your dedication and commitment
  Staff discounts in our on-site Walled Garden Café and charity shops
  Access to health and wellbeing support to promote a positive work-life balance
  A Refer a Friend Scheme with rewards for successful introductions
  Opportunities for career development and further qualifications
  A caring, inclusive environment where everyone’s contribution is valued

H2: Current Vacancies

[DROPDOWN: How to Apply]
  Staff Application Form 2025 → https://acornvillages.com/media/5vkjsac4/staff-application-form-2025.docx
  Equal Opportunities Form → https://acornvillages.com/media/houpdgee/equal-opps-2025.docx
  To apply for a vacancy listed please read the role's Job Description and then download and complete the Application Form and Equal Opportunities Form here. Please then return both via email to recruitment@acornvillages.com → mailto:recruitment@acornvillages.com
  If you have any questions please contact the Recruitment Team on 01206 394124.
  We look forward to hearing from you!
[DROPDOWN: Sleep in Care Support Worker]
  [IMAGE: 🚨]
  We’re Hiring – Sleep in Care Support Worker!
  [IMAGE: 🚨]
  Do
  you have a passion for helping adults with learning disabilities?
  [IMAGE: 💜]
  We’re looking for a Sleep in Care Support Worker to join our team
  [IMAGE: ✨]
  Minimum of 24 hours
  [IMAGE: ✨]
  Provide person-centred care in a safe, empowering environment at our 14-acre site in Mistley
  If you’re caring, compassionate, and ready to make a real difference, we’d love to hear from you! Email recruitment@acornvillages.com and complete our application form.
[DROPDOWN: Female Care Support Workers]
  [IMAGE: 🚨]
  We’re Hiring – Female Care Support Workers!
  [IMAGE: 🚨]
  Do
  you have a passion for helping adults with learning disabilities?
  [IMAGE: 💜]
  We’re looking for Female Care Support Workers to join our dedicated team.
  [IMAGE: ✨]
  Full-time & part-time roles available
  [IMAGE: ✨]
  Full flexibility required
  [IMAGE: ✨]
  Provide person-centred care in a safe, empowering environment at our 14-acre site in Mistley
  *Advertising for females only as this role involves close personal care, and due to the nature of the support required, there is a genuine occupational requirement for female staff under Schedule 9, Part 1 of the Equality Act 2010.*
  If you’re caring, compassionate, and ready to make a real difference, we’d love to hear from you! Email recruitment@acornvillages.com and complete our application form.

H2: Important Information

[DROPDOWN: Equality and Diversity]
  Acorn Village values diversity and is committed to promoting equal opportunities in the workplace. We are committed to ensuring that every job applicant, employee or worker will be treated fairly and equally with dignity and respect regardless of age, disability, gender reassignment, marital or civil partner status, pregnancy or maternity, race, colour, social class, nationality, ethnic or national origin, religious belief, union membership, political opinion, sex, sexual orientation or any other protected characteristics.
[DROPDOWN: Safeguarding]
  It is a criminal offence for people who are barred from working in Regulated Activity (under the Safeguarding and Vulnerable Groups Act 2006) to apply for roles that require them to work unsupervised with vulnerable adults.
[DROPDOWN: Modern Slavery Statement]
  Modern Slavery Statement → https://acornvillages.com/media/kwflcmrw/acorn-villages-modern-slavery-statement.docx
  Learn more here.

H2: Phil's Training and Career Development

"I joined Acorn in 2012 as a Support Worker and have been supported every step of the way to learn, develop and progress. Acorn has given me access to fantastic training — from regular mandatory refreshers to specialist courses like Health & Social Care, Team Leading, and the Senior Staff Development Programme.
Thanks to this ongoing support, I’ve grown from Support Worker to Head of Day Services. Acorn really invests in its people — if you’re passionate about making a difference and want a place that helps you build a career, not just a job, this is the place to be."
